acquisition method: MS data were acquired in the data-dependent mode with 3 s acquisition cycle.
collision energy: fragments were produced using CID with 35% normalized collision energy
fractionation method: crosslinked peptides were fractionated using SCX-StageTips
fragmentation method: fragments were produced using CID with 35% normalized collision energy
instrument: Peptides were analyzed on LTQ Orbitrap Velos (Thermo Fisher Scientific)
